# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: PASS

**Test:** XSS: reflected XSS via URL parameters
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:48.829Z
**OWASP Category:** API8:2023 - Security Misconfiguration

## Description

Reflected XSS payload "<img src=x onerror=alert("XSS")>" was not reflected unencoded.

## Why this result

Passed because Reflected XSS payload "<img src=x onerror=alert("XSS")>" was not reflected unencoded.
